creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
It worth mention in UPDATING that to update this ports correctly
one should deinstall old port first, because old port has yaml directory 
in %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%% and devel/py-yaml will try to install the same 
name directory on make depends phase; then old port will delete it on 
deinstall phase.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan
